seoTitle: Murrawee vs Murray-Sunset — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Murrawee and Murray-Sunset. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Murrawee and Murray-Sunset.
heading: Murrawee vs Murray-Sunset — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Murrawee, Victoria and Murray-Sunset, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Murray-Sunset has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Murrawee (47/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Murrawee or Murray-Sunset safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Murrawee has a flood risk score of 57/100, while Murray-Sunset scores 52/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Murrawee scores 48/100 for bushfire risk. Murray-Sunset scores 44/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Murrawee or Murray-Sunset?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Murray-Sunset has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.5% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
